name: radif_i2s_axis
description: Software-visible control and status registers for the bidirectional I2S to AXI-Stream audio bridge.

regions.name: radif_i2s_axis
regions.description: Controls I2S receive/transmit enables, generated clock dividers, LRCK framing, and transfer counters.

registers.name: control
registers.description: Controls the enabled audio datapaths and clears the software-visible transfer counters.

fields.name: I2S_TO_AXIS_EN
fields.description: Enables the I2S serial receive path. When set, completed left/right I2S samples are packed into AXI-Stream output frames.

fields.name: AXIS_TO_I2S_EN
fields.description: Enables the I2S serial transmit path. When set, AXI-Stream input frames are accepted and shifted out as left/right I2S samples.

fields.name: CLEAR
fields.description: Writing 1 clears RX_COUNT, TX_COUNT, and any sticky status bits. Software should write this as a pulse and then restore the desired enable bits.

registers.name: status
registers.description: Reports active transfer state and elaboration-time clocking modes for the I2S bridge.

fields.name: ACTIVE
fields.description: Set while an RX AXI-Stream frame is waiting to be accepted or a TX AXI-Stream frame is loaded for serial output.

fields.name: EXT_MCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with USE_EXTERNAL_MCLK true.

fields.name: EXT_BCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with USE_EXTERNAL_BCLK true and BCLK/LRCK are sampled from external pins.

fields.name: NO_MCLK_MODE
fields.description: Set when the core was elaborated with NO_MCLK true and the generated MCLK output is disabled.

registers.name: mclk_div
registers.description: Generated MCLK divider used when the core owns MCLK generation.

fields.name: MCLK_DIV
fields.description: MCLK half-period divider. The generated MCLK output toggles every MCLK_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles when USE_EXTERNAL_MCLK and NO_MCLK are both false.

registers.name: bclk_div
registers.description: Generated BCLK divider used when the core owns BCLK/LRCK generation.

fields.name: BCLK_DIV
fields.description: BCLK half-period divider. The generated BCLK output toggles every BCLK_DIV + 1 FPGA clock cycles when USE_EXTERNAL_BCLK is false.

registers.name: lrck_bits
registers.description: Configures the generated LRCK frame length.

fields.name: LRCK_HALF_FRAME_BITS
fields.description: Number of BCLK rising edges in each LRCK half-frame. Typical I2S operation uses the sample slot width, such as 32 for 24-bit audio in 32-bit slots.

registers.name: rx_count
registers.description: Counts stereo frames emitted by the I2S-to-AXI-Stream receive path.

fields.name: RX_FRAME_COUNT
fields.description: Monotonic count of completed left/right stereo frames presented on M_AXIS. Cleared by CONTROL.CLEAR or reset.

registers.name: tx_count
registers.description: Counts stereo frames consumed by the AXI-Stream-to-I2S transmit path.

fields.name: TX_FRAME_COUNT
fields.description: Monotonic count of AXI-Stream stereo frames accepted and shifted out on I2S. Cleared by CONTROL.CLEAR or reset.
